URL: https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom
Language: rust
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: always-further/nono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/always-further/nono
Language: rust
Capability-based agent runtime with fine-grained policies . Brokering access directly within the agent's operating context, with zero setup and zero latency

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asterinas/asterinas
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asterinas/asterinas
Language: rust
Asterinas aims to be a production-grade Linux alternative—memory safe, high-performance, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cube-js/cube
Language: rust
📊 Cube Core is open-source semantic layer for AI, BI and embedded analytics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbt-labs/dbt-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core
Language: rust
dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: edwardkim/rhwp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/edwardkim/rhwp
Language: rust
아래한글 hwp viewer and editor by rust and wasm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/pdf-inspector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/pdf-inspector
Language: rust
Fast Rust library for PDF inspection, classification, and text extraction. Intelligently detects scanned vs text-based PDFs to enable smart routing decisions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ai-project/git-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ai-project/git-ai
Language: rust
A Git extension for tracking the AI-generated code in your repos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: graykode/abtop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/graykode/abtop
Language: rust
Like htop, but for AI coding agents. Monitor Claude Code & Codex CLI sessions, tokens, context window, rate limits, and ports in real-time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iii-hq/iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iii-hq/iii
Language: rust
Effortlessly compose, extend, and observe every service in real-time for the first time ever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: j178/prek
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/j178/prek
Language: rust
⚡ A fast Git hook manager written in Rust, designed as a drop-in alternative to pre-commit, reimagined.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: junhoyeo/tokscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/junhoyeo/tokscale
Language: rust
🛰️ A CLI tool for tracking token usage from OpenCode, Claude Code, 🦞OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot), Pi, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, AmpCode, Factory Droid, Kimi, and more! • 🏅Global Leaderboard + 2D/3D Contributions Graph

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juspay/hyperswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juspay/hyperswitch
Language: rust
Open source, composable payments platform | PCI compliant | SaaS and Self-host options | Enables connectivity to multiple payment, payout, fraud, vault and tokenization providers | Uplifts authorization with intelligent routing and revenue recovery | Reduce payment processing costs with cost observability | Reduces payment ops with reconciliation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pydantic/monty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pydantic/monty
Language: rust
A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rust-lang/rust-analyzer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust-analyzer
Language: rust
A Rust compiler front-end for IDEs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: warpdotdev/warp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp
Language: rust
Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: web-infra-dev/rspack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rspack
Language: rust
Fast Rust-based bundler for the web with a modernized webpack API 🦀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: rust
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
